2. Bring a character from the left side (from i to 0) that matches s[n-1-i], and swap it to position i. The number of swaps needed is ((current position) - i).

Upon some research, I find that the correct approach is to use a two-pointer method where for each pair, if the characters don't match, we find the matching character on the right side and calculate the required swaps, then move the right pointer. If no match is found on the right, we look on the left and calculate the required swaps, then move the left pointer.

The key is to always find the closest matching character on the right side first, and if not found, then on the left side.

So, the code would look something like this:

public int minMovesToMakePalindrome(String s) {
    int left = 0, right = s.length() - 1;
    int res = 0;
    while (left < right) {
        if (s.charAt(left) == s.charAt(right)) {
            left++;
            right--;
        } else {
            int pos = right;
            while (pos >= left && s.charAt(pos) != s.charAt(left)) {
                pos--;
            }
            if (pos >= left) {
                res += right - pos;
                right = pos - 1;
            } else {
                pos = left;
                while (pos <= right && s.charAt(pos) != s.charAt(right)) {
                    pos++;
                }
                res += pos - left;
                left = pos + 1;
            }
        }
    }
    return res;
}

public int minMovesToMakePalindrome(String s) {
    int left = 0, right = s.length() - 1;
    int res = 0;
    while (left < right) {
        if (s.charAt(left) == s.charAt(right)) {
            left++;
            right--;
        } else {
            int pos = right;
            while (pos >= left && s.charAt(pos) != s.charAt(left)) {
                pos--;
            }
            if (pos >= left) {
                res += right - pos;
                right = pos - 1;
            } else {
                pos = left;
                while (pos <= right && s.charAt(pos) != s.charAt(right)) {
                    pos++;
                }
                res += pos - left;
                left = pos + 1;
            }
        }
    }
    return res;
}
